Pedro Gallese.bio: Peru's number one goalkeeper who has been outstanding in MLS with Orlando City. A key figure in Peru's 2018 World Cup squad and the undisputed first-choice keeper for over a decade.
Pedro Gallese.playingStyle: Commanding goalkeeper with excellent reflexes and strong penalty-saving ability, vocal in organizing his defense.
Pedro Gallese.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and one of the senior leaders of the squad.
Pedro Gallese.notableFact: Was Peru's hero in multiple penalty shootouts during their qualification campaigns, earning a reputation as one of South America's best spot-kick stoppers.

Luis Advíncula.bio: Explosive right-back who has been a fixture of the Peruvian national team for over a decade. Currently at Boca Juniors in Argentina, known for his blistering pace up the flank.
Luis Advíncula.playingStyle: Turbo-charged fullback whose electric pace makes him one of the fastest defenders in South American football, a constant threat on the overlap.
Luis Advíncula.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back whose pace and experience make him indispensable to Peru's defensive structure.
Luis Advíncula.notableFact: Consistently clocked as one of the fastest players in South American football, his sprint speed has been compared to elite wingers.

Aldo Corzo.bio: Veteran right-back and longtime Universitario captain who has served Peru faithfully across multiple qualifying campaigns. A reliable domestic league performer.
Aldo Corzo.playingStyle: Steady and positionally disciplined defender who prioritizes defensive solidity over attacking flair.
Aldo Corzo.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup fullback providing squad depth and veteran leadership in the dressing room.
Aldo Corzo.notableFact: Has been captain of Universitario de Deportes, one of Peru's most historic and well-supported clubs.

Alexander Callens.bio: Center-back who became a cult hero at New York City FC in MLS before moving to AEK Athens. Known for scoring crucial goals despite being a defender.
Alexander Callens.playingStyle: Strong, aggressive center-back who is dominant in aerial duels and carries a surprising goal threat from set pieces.
Alexander Callens.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back partnering Zambrano, providing a physical defensive presence and set-piece danger.
Alexander Callens.notableFact: Scored the winning goal in the 2021 MLS Cup final for New York City FC, becoming a hero in the club's first-ever championship.

Carlos Zambrano.bio: Battle-hardened center-back who has played across Europe and returned to Alianza Lima in Peru. One of the most experienced defenders in the squad with a fierce competitive edge.
Carlos Zambrano.playingStyle: Aggressive, old-school center-back who relishes physical battles, strong in the tackle, and an intimidating presence for opposing forwards.
Carlos Zambrano.worldCup2026Role: Senior center-back providing leadership and experience at the heart of Peru's defense.
Carlos Zambrano.notableFact: Spent significant time in Europe including stints in Germany and Switzerland, earning a reputation as one of Peru's toughest defenders.

Miguel Trauco.bio: Experienced left-back with a cannon of a left foot who has played in France and Brazil. A free-kick specialist and longtime fixture in Peru's national team.
Miguel Trauco.playingStyle: Attacking left-back with a powerful left foot, dangerous from set pieces and capable of delivering pinpoint crosses from wide areas.
Miguel Trauco.worldCup2026Role: Experienced left-back option whose set-piece delivery and attacking ability make him a valuable squad member.
Miguel Trauco.notableFact: His powerful left foot has produced some spectacular free-kick goals, making him one of Peru's most dangerous dead-ball specialists.

Andy Polo.bio: Versatile winger who has spent time in MLS and returned to Universitario in Peru. A squad player who provides width and work rate on the right side.
Andy Polo.playingStyle: Hardworking winger who tracks back diligently and provides width, more of a team player than an individual dribbler.
Andy Polo.worldCup2026Role: Depth option on the right wing who contributes both defensively and offensively.
Andy Polo.notableFact: Had a stint with Portland Timbers in MLS, gaining experience in North American football before returning to Peru.

Christian Cueva.bio: Mercurial playmaker who is Peru's most naturally gifted midfielder, capable of moments of pure brilliance. A veteran of the 2018 World Cup with over 100 caps despite a nomadic club career.
Christian Cueva.playingStyle: Creative number 10 with exceptional passing vision, close control, and the ability to produce magical moments that change matches.
Christian Cueva.worldCup2026Role: Experienced playmaker providing creative spark from the bench or in matches where Peru need to unlock stubborn defenses.
Christian Cueva.notableFact: Despite a famously turbulent career with numerous club moves, he remains one of Peru's most beloved and talented players with over 110 caps.

Paolo Guerrero.bio: Legendary Peruvian striker and all-time top scorer for the national team. At 42, the iconic captain would be making what could be a farewell World Cup appearance after a career spanning two decades across Germany, Brazil, and Peru.
Paolo Guerrero.playingStyle: Classic target striker with exceptional heading ability, strong hold-up play, and a lethal right foot inside the penalty area.
Paolo Guerrero.worldCup2026Role: Iconic squad member and captain whose presence inspires the team, likely a substitute role bringing experience in key moments.
Paolo Guerrero.notableFact: Peru's all-time leading scorer with 40 goals, he played for Bayern Munich's first team and had a prolific career in Brazil with Corinthians and Flamengo.

Bryan Reyna.bio: Exciting young winger who has earned a move to Argentine football with Belgrano. One of Peru's most exciting emerging attacking talents with pace and trickery.
Bryan Reyna.playingStyle: Direct, pacy winger who takes on defenders with skill and confidence, capable of creating chances out of nothing with his dribbling.
Bryan Reyna.worldCup2026Role: Exciting attacking option who can stretch defenses with his directness, expected to be an impact substitute or potential starter.
Bryan Reyna.notableFact: Made a rapid rise through Peruvian football to earn an international move, becoming one of the country's most talked-about young talents.

Raúl Ruidíaz.bio: Prolific striker who became one of the top scorers in MLS history with Seattle Sounders. Small in stature but lethal in the penalty area with an exceptional goalscoring record.
Raúl Ruidíaz.playingStyle: Fox-in-the-box striker who makes intelligent runs into scoring positions, clinical with both feet and his head despite his compact frame.
Raúl Ruidíaz.worldCup2026Role: Experienced striker providing goalscoring depth, particularly dangerous as a substitute when defenders tire.
Raúl Ruidíaz.notableFact: Became one of the all-time top scorers at Seattle Sounders, scoring over 70 goals in MLS and winning the Golden Boot.

Carlos Cáceda.bio: Experienced domestic goalkeeper who has been a loyal servant for Melgar in the Peruvian league. Provides reliable backup to Gallese in the national team setup.
Carlos Cáceda.playingStyle: Solid goalkeeper who excels in shot-stopping and is comfortable dealing with crosses into the box.
Carlos Cáceda.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing quality backup and training competition for the number one spot.
Carlos Cáceda.notableFact: Has been a key player for FBC Melgar, helping them compete in the Copa Libertadores and Copa Sudamericana.

Renato Tapia.bio: Midfield enforcer who has carved out a career in La Liga with Leganes after successful spells in the Netherlands and Spain. Peru's most important defensive midfielder.
Renato Tapia.playingStyle: Tenacious ball-winner who shields the defense effectively, breaking up opposition attacks and distributing the ball with calm efficiency.
Renato Tapia.worldCup2026Role: Starting defensive midfielder and the anchor of Peru's midfield, crucial for providing defensive stability.
Renato Tapia.notableFact: Developed through the Twente academy in the Netherlands, becoming one of the few Peruvians to come through a European youth system.

Gianluca Lapadula.bio: Italian-born striker who chose to represent Peru, bringing Serie A quality and experience. Has been a revelation since switching international allegiance, scoring important goals in qualifying.
Gianluca Lapadula.playingStyle: Hard-running striker who presses relentlessly and creates chances through sheer effort, clinical in front of goal with either foot.
Gianluca Lapadula.worldCup2026Role: Key striker whose combination of European experience and tireless pressing makes him a likely starter.
Gianluca Lapadula.notableFact: Born and raised in Italy, he chose to represent Peru through his mother's heritage, becoming an instant fan favorite with his passionate commitment.

Jesús Castillo.bio: Young midfielder who has earned a move to Portuguese football with Gil Vicente. An emerging talent who adds energy and dynamism to Peru's central midfield.
Jesús Castillo.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with good stamina and technical ability, effective at winning the ball back and driving forward with purpose.
Jesús Castillo.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield option providing energy and depth, capable of making an impact as a substitute.
Jesús Castillo.notableFact: His move to Portuguese football represents the growing trend of young Peruvian players seeking European experience early in their careers.

Marcos López.bio: Modern left-back who has established himself at Feyenoord in the Eredivisie, one of the most prestigious clubs in Dutch football. Peru's most valuable defender and a key figure in the squad.
Marcos López.playingStyle: Attack-minded left-back comfortable pushing high up the pitch, excellent crosser and capable of contributing assists consistently.
Marcos López.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back and one of Peru's most important players, providing width and attacking quality from the left flank.
Marcos López.notableFact: Has become a regular starter at Feyenoord, playing in the Champions League and establishing himself as one of the top left-backs in Dutch football.

Luis Iberico.bio: Hardworking winger from Melgar who provides domestic league quality and versatility to the squad. Known for his work rate and willingness to track back.
Luis Iberico.playingStyle: Diligent wide player who contributes defensively while providing width and direct running in attack.
Luis Iberico.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth player who can fill in on either wing, offering defensive reliability and energy off the bench.
Luis Iberico.notableFact: Has been one of the standout performers in Peru's Liga 1, consistently producing strong seasons for Melgar.

André Carrillo.bio: Experienced winger nicknamed 'La Culebra' (The Snake) who has had a long career spanning Sporting Lisbon, Benfica, Watford, and the Saudi Pro League. One of Peru's most capped active players.
André Carrillo.playingStyle: Powerful and direct winger with a strong physique, capable of beating defenders with a combination of skill and raw pace.
André Carrillo.worldCup2026Role: Veteran winger whose big-game experience and physical presence make him a valuable option in the final third.
André Carrillo.notableFact: Earned his nickname 'La Culebra' (The Snake) for his slithering dribbling style, and has played in five different countries during his career.

Yoshimar Yotún.bio: Veteran midfielder with over 115 caps who has been the heartbeat of Peru's midfield for over a decade. A tireless competitor whose leadership and consistency have been invaluable.
Yoshimar Yotún.playingStyle: Intelligent left-footed midfielder who controls tempo, delivers accurate set pieces, and provides tactical discipline in central areas.
Yoshimar Yotún.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield presence providing tactical intelligence and leadership, likely in a rotation role given his age.
Yoshimar Yotún.notableFact: Was a key player in Peru's historic 2018 World Cup qualification, their first appearance in 36 years, and has been a constant through three qualifying campaigns.

Edison Flores.bio: Versatile attacking midfielder who had a successful stint in MLS with DC United before returning to Universitario. Known for his intelligence in the final third and consistent goal contributions.
Edison Flores.playingStyle: Smart, off-the-ball runner who finds spaces between the lines, capable of scoring and creating with his movement and finishing.
Edison Flores.worldCup2026Role: Experienced attacking option providing depth behind the front line, dangerous with his intelligent runs into the box.
Edison Flores.notableFact: Scored crucial goals in Peru's 2018 World Cup qualifying campaign, earning the affectionate nickname 'Oreja' (Ear) from Peruvian fans.

Sergio Peña.bio: Technical midfielder who has impressed in Scandinavian football with Malmo in Sweden. Brings creative passing and vision to Peru's midfield.
Sergio Peña.playingStyle: Creative central midfielder with excellent passing range, capable of picking out teammates with incisive through balls and controlling the game's tempo.
Sergio Peña.worldCup2026Role: Midfield creator who can dictate play from deep, providing a different dimension to Peru's midfield options.
Sergio Peña.notableFact: Has been a regular in Swedish football, helping Malmo compete in European competition and the Allsvenskan title race.

Diego Romero.bio: Young goalkeeper from Universitario who represents the future of Peruvian goalkeeping. A rising talent who has shown maturity beyond his years.
Diego Romero.playingStyle: Athletic modern goalkeeper comfortable with the ball at his feet and quick off his line to deal with through balls.
Diego Romero.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper and future number one prospect, gaining invaluable World Cup experience.
Diego Romero.notableFact: At just 25, he is being groomed as the long-term successor to Pedro Gallese as Peru's first-choice goalkeeper.

Pedro Aquino.bio: Combative midfielder who has had stints in MLS and Liga MX, currently with Santos Laguna. A tough-tackling presence who adds steel to Peru's midfield.
Pedro Aquino.playingStyle: Aggressive ball-winning midfielder who combines physicality with decent distribution, effective at disrupting opposition buildup play.
Pedro Aquino.worldCup2026Role: Midfield enforcer who provides defensive depth and can be deployed when Peru need to protect a lead.
Pedro Aquino.notableFact: Previously played for Club America in Liga MX, one of the biggest and most demanding clubs in Mexican football.

Piero Quispe.bio: Peru's most exciting young talent, a creative attacking midfielder who earned a move to Pumas UNAM in Liga MX after dazzling performances at Universitario. The future of Peruvian football.
Piero Quispe.playingStyle: Dazzling playmaker with exceptional close control, creative vision, and the ability to produce moments of magic in the final third.
Piero Quispe.worldCup2026Role: Rising star expected to play a significant role as Peru's creative hub, potentially starting in the number 10 role.
Piero Quispe.notableFact: Considered the most talented Peruvian prospect in years, he has drawn comparisons to a young Christian Cueva for his creativity and flair.

Joao Grimaldo.bio: Young winger who moved to Partizan Belgrade in Serbia from Sporting Cristal. A pacey and direct attacker with a bright future in Peruvian football.
Joao Grimaldo.playingStyle: Quick and direct winger who loves to take on defenders, using his pace and skill to create chances from wide positions.
Joao Grimaldo.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young wide option who can make an impact with his speed and directness off the bench.
Joao Grimaldo.notableFact: Made the move to European football at a young age, joining Partizan Belgrade and gaining experience in the Serbian league and European competition.

Franco Zanelatto.bio: Young and talented right winger from Alianza Lima who has quickly emerged as one of Peru's most promising young attackers. Quick, skillful, and fearless.
Franco Zanelatto.playingStyle: Tricky young winger who relies on speed and technical ability to beat defenders, always looking to create chances with his dribbling.
Franco Zanelatto.worldCup2026Role: Young squad member gaining World Cup experience, capable of providing a spark as a late-game substitute.
Franco Zanelatto.notableFact: One of the youngest players in Peru's squad, representing the next generation of Peruvian talent coming through the domestic league.
